title: Bridge Essay: Rapid Interactions of Widespread Brain Networks Characterize Semantic Cognition.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Knowledge/Gnosis** (Phase 14) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Knowledge/Gnosis to mechanistic neuroscience through Rapid, Interactions, of, Widespread, Brain.

**Rapid Interactions of Widespread Brain Networks Characterize Semantic Cognition.** — J Neurosci. PMID: 36384679. DOI: 10.1523/JNEUROSCI.0529-21.2022. Language comprehension requires the rapid retrieval and integration of contextually appropriate concepts ("semantic cognition"). Current neurobiological models of semantic cognition are limited by the spatial and temporal restrictions of single-modality neuroimaging and lesion approaches. This is amajor impediment given the rapid sequence of processing steps that have to be coordinated to accurately comprehend language.
